---
title: "Minutes of Meeting"
author: "WEN Po-Yang"
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"
format:
  html:
    css: styles_the4.css
---

# Minutes of Meeting

[Minutes of Meeting 1](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Z5TOxibD9OrSH_KbtgVyOPM68Zng3goJ/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=106444124884892236446&rtpof=true&sd=true)

[Minutes of Meeting 2](https://docs.google.com/document/d/10_Vjt3PKJikXCBXSDfkrdUkKv71bh1Db/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=106444124884892236446&rtpof=true&sd=true)

[Minutes of Meeting 3](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xHH4V-59VqTM7TUkxDlwIdHgcl2J2CpD/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=106444124884892236446&rtpof=true&sd=true)
